verdict: Gold-standard antioxidant serum with stabilized L-ascorbic acid, vitamin E, and ferulic acid delivering clinically-proven photoprotection and brightening. High price justified by ingredient potency and consistent clinical validation across thousands of reviews.

_research.name: SkinCeuticals C E Ferulic Serum
_research.con: Very expensive; requires careful storage to maintain potency; slight oxidation over time is normal.
